commands.purpose: JSON syntax validation for contract and fixture evidence surfaces.

commands.command: node -c packages/control-plane/src/policies.js && node -c packages/control-plane/src/validators.js && node -c packages/control-plane/src/service.js && node -c scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs
commands.purpose: Syntax validation for changed control-plane modules and RP00 validator.
Hermes H00 RP00 control-plane contract validator after evidence materialization.
No state or registry mutation for this contract-only slice.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used; fixtures remain synthetic-only and reserved to example/test identifiers.

The first RP00 validator run failed only because these five closeout evidence files were intentionally absent before Claude review and adjudication; after evidence materialization the command is required to pass.
